title: Hardcoded Database Connection URL
description: Database connection string with embedded credentials found in source code
remediation: Use environment variables for database URLs. Never embed credentials in connection strings in code.

title: Hardcoded Generic Secret Assignment
description: Secret or credential assigned directly in source code
remediation: Use environment variables or a secrets vault. Rotate the exposed credential immediately.

title: SQL injection via template literal (reverse order)
description: SQL statement contains template literal interpolation
evidence: ok = r.status === 201 && data.id; | el.textContent += `${ok ? '✅' : '❌'} Create task: ${r.status}\n`; ok ? pass++ : fail++; | const taskId = data.id;
remediation: Use parameterized queries. Replace ${variable} with ? or $1 placeholders.

title: SQL injection via template literal (reverse order)
description: SQL statement contains template literal interpolation
evidence: ok = r.status === 200 && data.status === 'in_progress'; | el.textContent += `${ok ? '✅' : '❌'} Update task status: ${r.status}\n`; ok ? pass++ : fail++; |
remediation: Use parameterized queries. Replace ${variable} with ? or $1 placeholders.

title: SQL injection via template literal (reverse order)
description: SQL statement contains template literal interpolation
evidence: ok = r.status === 200 && data.deleted; | el.textContent += `${ok ? '✅' : '❌'} Delete task: ${r.status}\n`; ok ? pass++ : fail++; |
remediation: Use parameterized queries. Replace ${variable} with ? or $1 placeholders.

title: State-changing routes without CSRF protection
description: File defines POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE routes but no CSRF middleware is referenced
remediation: Add CSRF protection middleware (e.g., csurf). Use CSRF tokens in forms and AJAX requests.

title: State-changing routes without CSRF protection

remediation: Add CSRF protection middleware (e.g., csurf). Use CSRF tokens in forms and AJAX requests.

title: Route without auth middleware: /payment
description: Route '/payment' does not appear to use authentication middleware
remediation: Add authentication middleware to protect this route. Example: router.get("/path", authMiddleware, handler)

title: Floating dependency version: cookie-parser@^1.4.7
description: Dependency "cookie-parser" uses floating version "^1.4.7" — builds may not be reproducible
remediation: Pin dependency versions to exact versions (remove ^ or ~ prefix). Use a lockfile for reproducible builds.
